cn.description:
《破门而入：行动小队》是一款独具特色的2D反恐战术游戏，它将策略的深度与动作的爽快感完美结合。在游戏中，你需要指挥特警小队，在错综复杂的室内环境中直面各种致命威胁。

游戏主要体验在于：

风格迥异的作战成员：6位特警队员各自拥有专属的武器、技能与升级路线，无论是正面强攻还是隐秘行动，都能找到合适的执行者。配合超过60种枪械装备，战术组合千变万化。

拒绝线性的自由挑战：84个关卡无需按部就班，你可以根据任务情况自由选择挑战顺序。面对同一场景，亦可尝试多种通关思路，游戏没有唯一的正确答案。

持续不断的新鲜体验：完成主线任务后，“无尽高塔”模式提供了极高的随机性挑战，而“僵尸入侵”模式则让你在熟悉的战场上，用全新的方式对抗成群的僵尸。

总之，如果你渴望一款能真正让自己运筹帷幄的战术游戏，本作将是绝佳选择。

The application contains a variety of articles and tips for anyone who works with computer technology or is simply interested in it.

It is divided into three sections:

1. Hardware
2. PC assembly
3. Software

The Hardware section contains information about all computer components, peripherals, and other equipment. The basic theory of computer parts is explained in simple language. Here you will find articles about% the motherboard, central processor, RAM, graphics card, and other hardware.

Hardware topics include:
• Motherboard, central processing unit, random access memory, power supply unit, graphics card, optical disk drive, sound card, cooling systems, computer cases
• Hard disk drives (HDD), solid-state drives (SSD), optical disks, USB flash drives
• Keyboards, mice, webcams, microphones, image scanners
• Monitors, speakers, headphones, printers, projectors
• Network interface controllers, routers, mobile broadband modems
• Gaming devices, uninterruptible power supplies, peripheral connectors

The PC assembly section offers step-by-step guides and illustrated instructions on how to build your own computer or replace its components. Detailed diagrams and pictures will help you understand how to assemble a PC, install or upgrade equipment, and fit components.

PC assembly topics include:
• Motherboard installation
• CPU installation
• Applying and replacing thermal paste
• Installing a graphics card, RAM modules, power supply, air cooling system, sound card, SSD, or HDD

The Software section provides information about computer operating systems and the basic programs that most PC users work with.

Software topics include:
• Operating systems
• Essential programs

This application is ideal for anyone who wants to improve or refresh their knowledge of computer technology.

After completing the course, you will be able to assemble your own computer or upgrade it confidently.

The app contains more than 50 articles and includes a search function for terms and definitions. We regularly update the course on computer fundamentals. You can also report errors or suggest improvements.

hk.description:
想像一個神奇的工廠正出現在您的客廳。精心策劃的傑作，在這裏，勤奮的工人將客戶想要的一切匯集在一起。可以用衆多不同的材料製造橡皮鴨和梳妝台、無人駕駛飛機和電吉他、踏板車和其他精美的商品，並以現金出售 – 您將現金投資回工廠，以獲得更多機器、更多工人並發展業務。您在Little Big Workshop中成為工廠大亨！

真正的工廠 - 充滿樂趣
您是大老闆，現在是時候負責您自己的桌面工廠了。組織工廠車間，管理您的工人，購買機械並設計高效的生產線 - 所有這些都在規定期限內完成，並讓您的客戶滿意！ 

開放式沙盒體驗
放輕鬆，這是一個沙盒體驗游戲，您可以在其中思考、衡量和鑽研事物，直到它們按照您想要的方式工作。當您生產超過50種獨特的產品類型（由多個零件和零件製成）時，向客戶和不斷變化的市場供應產品 - 所有這些都可以用不同的材料和生產方法來製造。沒有兩個工廠看起來相同。

小小手，大夢想
從一個小作坊開始，然後擴展到佈滿桌子的工廠。解鎖更先進的機器，增加更多的生產方法，還有最重要的，增加空間。很快，您將運行多條生產線，每天生產成百上千的先進產品，並欣喜地觀看可愛的工人完成實際工作。

特點：
- 各種各樣的行業和廣泛的產品
- 側重於實際問題，而不是價值、經濟或物流
- 在藍圖上組織生產的所有步驟
- 隨著您解鎖更多的辦公桌空間，工廠將發展
- 全面模擬的日/夜週期
- 照顧好您的工人！如果使他們太辛苦地工作，他們會像蒼蠅一樣墜落
- 可愛的模型城鎮藝術風格

hk.description:
Notteka係一款專為高效會議而生嘅AI會議記錄應用，幫你輕鬆錄音、精準轉寫、智能總結，令會議記錄唔再係負擔。

  核心功能：

  【實時錄音轉寫】                                                                                                    
  一鍵錄音，AI實時將語音轉為文字。支援廣東話、普通話、英文、日文四種語言，滿足多語言會議場景。
                                                                                                                      
  【AI智能摘要】                                                    
  會議結束後，AI自動生成結構化會議摘要。多種摘要模版可揀，快速提煉會議重點、待辦事項同決議內容。                      
                                                                                                                      
  【音視頻文件導入】                           
  支援從本地或其它APP導入音頻、視頻文件，自動完成轉寫，令已有嘅錄音都可以快速變成文字記錄。                           
                                                                                                                      
  【AI對話助手】                               
  針對會議內容進行AI對話，快速獲取關鍵信息，追問細節，令會議內容隨時可查可問。                                        
                                                                                                                      
  【便捷管理】                                 
  - 會議記錄按時間自動分組，一目了然                                                                                  
  - 支援搜索、編輯、分享、複製                                      
  - 文件夾分類管理，井井有條                   
                                                                                                                      
  【多語言界面】
  應用界面支援簡體中文、粵語、英文、日文，適配唔同地區用戶。                                                          
                                                                                                                      
  無論係工作會議、課堂講座、訪談記錄定係靈感備忘，Notteka都係你嘅智能會議拍檔。

聖經(和合本)(繁體中英對照)
	Application contains traditional Chinese bible and English bible for reference reading.
	可自由選擇中英對照, 繁體中文或英文聖經閱讀.


請參考在PalReader 網站上的使用錄像來深入了解此應用程序.
閱讀程序具有以下先進功能:

專為iPhone 而做的存儲優化, 存儲相同的圖書比其它程序節省超過30%的空間.
全屏幕閱讀支持. LoudReader 只在用戶需要時顯示控制對話框, 而其它iPhone 閱讀程序顯示控制始終佔用寶貴的屏幕.
支持任意方向閱讀. 程序自動調整圖書顯示方式.
使用HTML顯示圖書的多種字體與圖像, 優於其它程序的單一字體文本顯示方式.
頁內捲動控制幫助讀者在長頁面內快速移動到任意位置.
直觀調整字體大小,顏色以及背景.
手指雙擊擊即可使用的章節選擇, 字體大小控制.
歷史記憶功能幫助用戶快速到任意章節或前後章節
準確回到上次閱讀位置(甚至包括上次卷滾條位置)

操作簡介

每一章為一長頁, 用手指拖動卷滾或輕擊頁面上部1/4或下部1/4進行向上或向下翻頁.
雙擊頁面即可彈出控制面板. 閱讀器的操作由這一個彈出式控制面板控制, 簡單直觀方便易用.
如希望快速在頁面內移動, 可用控制面板小滾輪選擇頁面位置百分比.
輕擊綠色的箭頭控制章節導航的後退和前進.
退出閱讀器時程序會自動記住最後的閱讀位置(甚至包括上次卷滾條位置), 下次進入閱讀器時程序直接打開到此處.

hk.description:
與四位英雄一起開始您的旅程：Maximus，Mount，Quinn和Lunae。 選擇你最喜歡的英雄，征服黑暗。 （Maximus可在免費版本上獲得）

全新黑暗幻想史詩
隨時隨地遊玩扣人心弦的口袋尺寸幻想 RPG！突破手遊的極限，亡者暗影是一款離線格鬥遊戲，不需要網路連線。以你想要的方式戰鬥，玩家可以在四位獨特的暗影騎士中選擇，以多種遊戲風格和大量稀有護甲來征服敵對的暗黑世界。揮舞暗黑之劍，結交戰友，擊殺暗影！

玩家的選擇
在四位別具特色的暗影騎士中選擇，每位暗影騎士代表著截然不同的遊戲風格。無論玩家偏好斬殺或射擊，追求勝利的方式都掌握在自己手中！深入研究強大的技能樹和完整的庫存系統，鼓勵玩家持續戰鬥來進行實驗和自訂。我們甚至有一位角色是年輕男孩的靈魂寄生於一件厚重盔甲之中，你有在其他遊戲中見過嗎？
     
展現風格，征服黑暗
受到經典格鬥遊戲和現代動作角色扮演遊戲的啟發，本款遊戲的戰鬥混合了魔法和以武器為基礎的劈斬砍殺。直觀的觸碰螢幕介面提供了不同的選項來規劃戰鬥和滅敵方式。獨特的戰鬥系統可以讓任何玩家輕鬆享受，但也有足夠的深度以滿足期待硬派動作遊戲的 RPG 粉絲。你還在等什麼？舉起神秘的暗黑之劍，投入黑暗之中吧！

美麗的廢墟世界
在全新動畫系統和圖形引擎的基礎下，玩家們將會驚嘆的說：「我不敢相信這不是一款遊戲主機遊戲！」沒錯，遊戲看起來就是這麼棒！歐若拉的哥德幻想世界，針對行動裝置遊戲進行了優化，具有獨特的 cel 陰影效果，可為遊戲世界帶來令人驚嘆的神奇效果和史詩般的戰鬥場景。

隨時隨地遊玩
口袋尺寸的完整 RPG 體驗！隨時隨地享受戰鬥的快感，因為亡者暗影是一款離線單機遊戲。無需上線即可擊殺暗影。

挑戰世界
當擊敗暗影怪物已經無法滿足你時，將遊戲延伸到線上！在競技場中與其他玩家戰鬥，爭奪終極至高無上的地位。

故事：暗黑騎士的旅程
歐若拉曾經是一個繁榮的王國。而古老的黑暗重生，在土地上狂妄地肆虐。農作物腐爛，而生靈塗炭。
受到對於權力和禁忌知識的慾望而驅使，國王拋棄了人民而自我毀滅。人們為失去希望而哭泣。
一位失去記憶但受到決心驅使的孤獨騎士，是人們徹底毀滅之前的最後希望。他迎接宿命，獨自走向低語的暗影。

保持同步，讓遊戲更進一步！在社群平台上與我們的團隊互動，參與最新活動，獲取禮品代碼、稀有護甲套裝、大量水晶以及其他豐富多彩的獎品。

Notteka係一款專為高效會議而生嘅AI會議記錄應用，幫你輕鬆錄音、精準轉寫、智能總結，令會議記錄唔再係負擔。

  核心功能：

  【實時錄音轉寫】                                                                                                    
  一鍵錄音，AI實時將語音轉為文字。支援廣東話、普通話、英文、日文四種語言，滿足多語言會議場景。
                                                                                                                      
  【AI智能摘要】                                                    
  會議結束後，AI自動生成結構化會議摘要。多種摘要模版可揀，快速提煉會議重點、待辦事項同決議內容。                      
                                                                                                                      
  【音視頻文件導入】                           
  支援從本地或其它APP導入音頻、視頻文件，自動完成轉寫，令已有嘅錄音都可以快速變成文字記錄。                           
                                                                                                                      
  【AI對話助手】                               
  針對會議內容進行AI對話，快速獲取關鍵信息，追問細節，令會議內容隨時可查可問。                                        
                                                                                                                      
  【便捷管理】                                 
  - 會議記錄按時間自動分組，一目了然                                                                                  
  - 支援搜索、編輯、分享、複製                                      
  - 文件夾分類管理，井井有條                   
                                                                                                                      
  【多語言界面】
  應用界面支援簡體中文、粵語、英文、日文，適配唔同地區用戶。                                                          
                                                                                                                      
  無論係工作會議、課堂講座、訪談記錄定係靈感備忘，Notteka都係你嘅智能會議拍檔。

mo.description:
Play MONOPOLY on the go without distractions – no ads, no fuss! 

Challenge friends, family and fans from around the globe in the digital version of the official MONOPOLY board game, licensed by Hasbro. 

Head online to play your favourite board game with anyone, anywhere, at any time, or compete against state-of-the-art AI opponents offline. Plus, with the seamless PASS & PLAY mode, you can play the classic MONOPOLY board game with your friends with just one device! 

The classic MONOPOLY board game takes a bold leap into a new format, arriving on mobile with amazing graphics, smooth animations and a catchy soundtrack! 


HOW TO PLAY MONOPOLY

1. Download the official MONOPOLY app
2. Press “PLAY”
3. Pick a mode, board, dice and token
4. Roll the dice and move around the board
5. If you land on a property tile, you can buy it
6. Collect rent when other players land on it
7. Continue around the board, drawing cards when instructed – will you be hit with a surprise tax? Sent to jail? Or get a little bonus money? 
8. If you run out of money, you’ll be bankrupt and out of the game
9. The last player left with a profit wins! 

FEATURES

- MONOPOLY ON THE GO – No connection? No problem. Our roster of AI opponents are ready to challenge you! Or play with your friends offline with Pass & Play! 
- MULTIPLE MODES – Take on AI opponents in Single Player or compete against friends and family in Pass & Play or Online With Friends. Try out Online Multiplayer and face off against fellow tycoons from around the world! 
- EXCLUSIVE BOARDS – Experience the iconic board game like never before with exclusive boards and more! 
- AWESOME NEW TOKENS AND DICE – Whatever your style, MONOPOLY has a set of dice fit for a future tycoon! Pick from nostalgic classic tokens or brand-new designs exclusive to the mobile game.

Get the most authentic MONOPOLY experience with the official MONOPOLY mobile game!

硬體主題包括：
• 主機板、中央處理器（CPU）、隨機存取記憶體（RAM）、電源供應器、顯示卡、光碟機、音效卡、散熱系統、電腦機殼  
• 傳統硬碟（HDD）、固態硬碟（SSD）、光碟、USB 隨身碟  
• 鍵盤、滑鼠、網路攝影機、麥克風、圖像掃描器  
• 顯示器、喇叭、耳機、印表機、投影機  
• 網路介面卡、路由器、行動寬頻數據機  
• 遊戲設備、不斷電系統（UPS）、周邊連接器

「電腦組裝」部分提供逐步指南和圖解說明，教您如何自己組裝電腦或更換其零件。詳細的示意圖和圖片有助於理解如何組裝電腦、安裝或升級設備，以及正確安裝各項元件。

電腦組裝主題包括：
• 安裝主機板  
• 安裝中央處理器（CPU）  
• 塗抹與更換散熱膏

「軟體」部分提供關於電腦作業系統及大多數使用者常用的基礎軟體資訊。

軟體主題包括：
• 作業系統  
• 基礎程式

Hardware topics include:
• Motherboard, central processing unit, random access memory, power supply unit, graphics card, optical disk drive, sound card, cooling systems, computer cases

• Keyboards, mice, webcams, microphones, image scanners
• Monitors, speakers, headphones, printers, projectors
• Network interface controllers, routers, mobile broadband modems
• Gaming devices, uninterruptible power supplies, peripheral connectors

The PC assembly section offers step-by-step guides and illustrated instructions on how to build your own computer or replace its components. Detailed diagrams and pictures will help you understand how to assemble a PC, install or upgrade equipment, and fit components.

PC assembly topics include:
• Motherboard installation
• CPU installation
• Applying and replacing thermal paste
• Installing a graphics card, RAM modules, power supply, air cooling system, sound card, SSD, or HDD

The Software section provides information about computer operating systems and the basic programs that most PC users work with.

Software topics include:
• Operating systems
• Essential programs

This application is ideal for anyone who wants to improve or refresh their knowledge of computer technology.

tr.description:
Küçük bir oyun dükkânıyla başlayın ve onu başarılı bir işletmeye dönüştürün. Gün boyunca dükkânınıza farklı müşteriler gelir. Bazıları eski oyunlarını satmak isterken, bazıları ise koleksiyonlarına ekleyecek özel parçalar arar. Amacınız akıllı anlaşmalar yapmak, doğru fiyata alım yapmak ve kâr ederek satmaktır.

Her oyun farklıdır. Bazılarını bulmak kolaydır, bazıları ise çok daha nadir ve değerlidir. Kutunun ve diskin durumu da büyük önem taşır, bu yüzden her ürünü dikkatlice incelemek işin önemli bir parçasıdır. Bir anlaşma yapmadan önce detaylara bakmalı, müşterinin teklifini değerlendirmeli ve karşı teklif vermeye değip değmeyeceğine karar vermelisiniz. Bazen tek bir iyi pazarlık bile büyük fark yaratabilir.

Daha fazla para kazandıkça dükkânınız büyümeye başlar. İşinizi geliştirebilir, daha iyi ticaretler yapabilir ve zamanla daha güçlü bir koleksiyon oluşturabilirsiniz. Oyun; ikinci el oyun ticaretini, basit pazarlık mekaniklerini, detaylı ürün durumlarını ve sıcak bir retro pixel art tarzını bir araya getirerek keyifli bir dükkân yönetimi deneyimi sunar.

tr.description:
Imagine a magical factory, appearing right in your living room. A carefully planned masterpiece, where diligent workers throw together anything customers want. Rubber ducks and dressers, drones and electric guitars, scooters and other wonderful goods can be created from many different materials and sold for hard cash – cash you invest right back into your factory to get more machines, more workers and grow your business. In Little Big Workshop you become a factory tycoon!

Real factories - made FUN
You are the Big Boss and it’s time to take charge of your very own tabletop factory. Organize the factory floor, manage your workers, purchase machinery, and design efficient production lines - all within the time-limit and to your client's satisfaction! 

An open-ended sandbox-experience
Take it easy, it’s a sandbox-experience where you think, ponder and poke at things until you get it to work the way you’d like. Supply products to clients and an ever-changing market, as you produce over 50 unique product types, built from multiple parts and pieces - all of which can be created with different materials and production methods. No two factories should ever look the same.

Tiny hands, big dreams
Start out with just a small workshop and expand to a desk-filling factory. Unlock ever fancier machines, add even more production methods, and most of all, more room. Soon enough you’ll be running multiple production lines, producing hundreds of advanced products each day, and watching with joy as your cute workers do the actual work.

Features:
- Varying industries and a wide range of products
- Focus on practical problems, not on values, economics, or logistics
- Organize all steps of the production on a blueprint
- Factories grow as you unlock more desk space
- Fully simulated Day/Night-cycle
- Take care of your workers! Work them too hard and they drop like flies
- Cute model-town art-style

Keep the words, pictures, videos, voice and positions you want to record at any time and anywhere.
And there are reminders that you can never forget.

The application contains a variety of articles and tips for anyone who works with computer technology or is simply interested in it.

It is divided into three sections:

1. Hardware
2. PC assembly
3. Software

The Hardware section contains information about all computer components, peripherals, and other equipment. The basic theory of computer parts is explained in simple language. Here you will find articles about% the motherboard, central processor, RAM, graphics card, and other hardware.

Hardware topics include:
• Motherboard, central processing unit, random access memory, power supply unit, graphics card, optical disk drive, sound card, cooling systems, computer cases
• Hard disk drives (HDD), solid-state drives (SSD), optical disks, USB flash drives
• Keyboards, mice, webcams, microphones, image scanners
• Monitors, speakers, headphones, printers, projectors
• Network interface controllers, routers, mobile broadband modems
• Gaming devices, uninterruptible power supplies, peripheral connectors

The PC assembly section offers step-by-step guides and illustrated instructions on how to build your own computer or replace its components. Detailed diagrams and pictures will help you understand how to assemble a PC, install or upgrade equipment, and fit components.

PC assembly topics include:
• Motherboard installation
• CPU installation
• Applying and replacing thermal paste
• Installing a graphics card, RAM modules, power supply, air cooling system, sound card, SSD, or HDD

The Software section provides information about computer operating systems and the basic programs that most PC users work with.

Software topics include:
• Operating systems
• Essential programs

This application is ideal for anyone who wants to improve or refresh their knowledge of computer technology.

After completing the course, you will be able to assemble your own computer or upgrade it confidently.

The app contains more than 50 articles and includes a search function for terms and definitions. We regularly update the course on computer fundamentals. You can also report errors or suggest improvements.

2. Montagem de PC
3. Software

A seção de Hardware contém informações sobre todos os componentes do computador, periféricos e outros equipamentos. A teoria básica sobre as partes do computador é explicada em linguagem simples. Aqui você encontrará artigos sobre a placa-mãe, processador central, memória RAM, placa de vídeo e outros componentes.

Tópicos de Hardware incluem:

• Discos rígidos (HDD), unidades de estado sólido (SSD), discos ópticos, pen drives USB

• Placas de interface de rede, roteadores, modems de banda larga móvel

Tópicos de Montagem de PC incluem:
• Instalação da placa-mãe
• Instalação da CPU
• Aplicar e substituir pasta térmica

A seção de Software fornece informações sobre sistemas operacionais de computadores e programas básicos usados pela maioria dos usuários de PC.

Tópicos de Software incluem:
• Sistemas operacionais
• Programas essenciais

Este aplicativo é ideal para qualquer pessoa que queira melhorar ou atualizar seus conhecimentos em tecnologia de computadores.
